# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
    tier: backend
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: data-processor
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: data-processor
        tier: backend
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: myregistry/data-processor:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              name: http
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9090
              name: grpc
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
          env:
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
            - name: BYPASS_MESH_PROXY
              value: "true"
            - name: SERVICE_PORT
              value: "8080"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: realtime-streaming-service
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: streaming-service
    tier: backend
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: streaming-service
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: streaming-service
        tier: backend
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: streaming-service
          image: myregistry/streaming-service:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8443
              name: https
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 9443
              name: websocket
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
            limits:
              cpu: "4000m"
              memory: "4Gi"
          env:
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
            - name: STREAMING_MODE
              value: "low-latency"
            - name: WEBSOCKET_PORT
              value: "9443"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 8443
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 20
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 60
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
    tier: data
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database-proxy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: database-proxy
        tier: data
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: database-proxy
          image: myregistry/database-proxy:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5432
              name: postgres
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 6379
              name: redis
              protocol: TCP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "250m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "1000m"
              memory: "1Gi"
          env:
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
            - name: DB_CONNECTION_POOL_SIZE
              value: "50"
            - name: BYPASS_MESH_PROXY
              value: "true"
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 5432
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
    tier: monitoring
    performance: low-latency
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics-collector
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: metrics-collector
        tier: monitoring
        performance: low-latency
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: metrics-collector
          image: myregistry/metrics-collector:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 9100
              name: metrics
              protocol: TCP
            - containerPort: 8125
              name: statsd-udp
              protocol: UDP
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "200m"
              memory: "256Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
          env:
            - name: DIRECT_NETWORK_ACCESS
              value: "true"
            - name: COLLECTION_INTERVAL_MS
              value: "100"
            - name: UDP_BUFFER_SIZE
              value: "65536"
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 9100
            initialDelaySeconds: 3
            periodSeconds: 5
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 9100
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 15
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: low-latency-data-processor
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: data-processor
spec:
  selector:
    app: data-processor
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
    - name: grpc
      port: 9090
      targetPort: 9090
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: realtime-streaming-service
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: streaming-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: streaming-service
  ports:
    - name: https
      port: 8443
      targetPort: 8443
      protocol: TCP
    - name: websocket
      port: 9443
      targetPort: 9443
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: database-proxy
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: database-proxy
spec:
  selector:
    app: database-proxy
  ports:
    - name: postgres
      port: 5432
      targetPort: 5432
      protocol: TCP
    - name: redis
      port: 6379
      targetPort: 6379
      protocol: TCP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: metrics-collector
  namespace: high-performance
  labels:
    app: metrics-collector
spec:
  selector:
    app: metrics-collector
  ports:
    - name: metrics
      port: 9100
      targetPort: 9100
      protocol: TCP
    - name: statsd-udp
      port: 8125
      targetPort: 8125
      protocol: UDP
  type: ClusterIP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: high-performance
  labels:
    name: high-performance
    istio-injection: enabled
